title: piper corylifolium
intro: Piper corylifolium, also known as Long Pepper or Indian Long Pepper, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pepper family (Piperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Piper corylifolium include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. Piper corylifolium is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
